overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game depicting a character in a futuristic exoskeleton suit with a glowing backpack traversing a remote mountain valley at night. The character moves steadily along a dirt path between rocky cliffs under a starry sky, gradually approaching distant artificial lights on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass between steep rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: character in futuristic suit with illuminated backpack walking steadily along the mountain path

entered.detail: steep rocky mountain wall forming the left boundary of the narrow pass
steep rocky mountain wall forming the right boundary of the narrow pass
sandy dirt trail winding through the mountain valley
dark night sky with visible stars above the mountain peaks
scattered tufts of grass and small vegetation along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow mountain pass at night, with the camera following a character in a futuristic exoskeleton suit from behind. Steep rocky cliffs rise on both sides of the sandy dirt path, while sparse vegetation dots the ground. The starry sky is partially visible above the mountain peaks as the character walks steadily forward through the enclosed terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: opening mountain valley with distant horizon visible

events.description: distant artificial lights become visible on the horizon as the valley opens up

agents.ego_description: character continues walking forward as the terrain opens into a wider valley

entered.detail: string of small white lights visible on the distant horizon indicating a faraway settlement

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the narrow pass opens into a wider mountain valley with full sky visibility. The rocky cliffs recede into the distance on both sides, and a string of distant artificial lights becomes visible on the horizon ahead. The terrain remains a dirt trail with sparse vegetation as the environment transitions from enclosed to open.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide valley approaching distant illuminated structure

events.description: tall structure with blue glowing light becomes visible on the right side of the valley

agents.ego_description: character continues descending toward the distant lights, approaching the settlement

entered.detail: tall vertical structure emitting blue light visible on the right side of the valley

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character continuing through the wide valley as the distant lights grow closer and more defined. A tall structure with distinctive blue lighting becomes visible on the right side of the frame. The rocky terrain of the valley floor remains consistent as the character approaches the illuminated destination in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive mountain pass that gradually opens into a wide, illuminated valley. It begins by trailing a character in a futuristic exoskeleton suit through a narrow corridor of steep rocky cliffs and sparse vegetation under a partially obscured starry sky. As the character progresses, the enclosed pass expands into a broad valley where the cliffs recede and the full expanse of the night sky is revealed. The scene then shifts as a string of artificial lights emerges on the horizon, growing more defined as the character moves across the rocky valley floor. Finally, the camera approaches the distant destination, bringing a tall structure with distinctive blue lighting into view on the right.
